activated_rules.rule_name: Mixed origins at item level must be linked

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Borealis GmbH c/o Borealis AB' from certificate found explicitly in invoice header and issuer information including 'Borealis GmbH' registered in Vienna/Austria and mention of 'c/o Borealis AB, 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Land Sweden matches in certificate and invoice reference to 'SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN' after normalization (4.1.0). No mismatch found.

consignee.motivation: Consignee from certificate 'Hascelik Kablo Sanayi Ticaret A.S., MELIKGAZI KAYSERI, Türkiye' is explicitly found in invoice in primary Buyer/Customer name and delivery address fields with identical name and address. Country matches Sweden's Turkey variant accounting for normalization (4.2.0.2). No mismatch found.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene
Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch
Ambicat LE4472 Bag Catalyst masterbatch
goods_description.invoice_value:
Visico LE4423 Borealis Octabin LD Polyethylene
Ambicat LE4476 Bag Catalyst masterbatch
Ambicat LE4472 Bag Catalyst masterbatch
goods_description.motivation: Goods description from certificate matches exactly with invoice line item descriptions including article numbers. Items Visico LE4423 and Ambicat LE4476/LE4472 are present. Multiple origins (Sweden, Finland) are linked per article matching certificate origins (European Community; Sweden; with Finland arising in invoice). Mixed origins are properly linked with no mismatch (4.3.7).

quantity.motivation: Quantities in certificate match numerically and in unit (KG) those in invoice for respective article lines. Certificate net quantities are exactly found in invoice including 10,750.00 KG and 6,225.00 KG for first two items and 2,500.00 KG for third. The invoice includes an extra 1,500.00 KG line for Ambicat LE4476 not in certificate but extra info does not cause mismatch per rules (2.1). Minor difference in decimal notation normalized (4.4.3.3).

origin.motivation: Certificate specifies origins as 'European Community; Sweden'; invoice shows goods of origin 'Sweden' and 'Finland'. Finland is an EU member state but is not explicitly named in the certificate. According to rules (4.5.4.1), additional EU countries in the invoice but not listed in the certificate lead to manual review, not mismatch. Thus origin verification is MANUAL_REVIEW.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor, consignee, goods description, and quantity match between certificate and invoice. The origin verification cannot be completed automatically due to mixed origins with Finland present only in invoice. This uncertainty triggers a manual review.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger ursprung som European Community och Sverige, men fakturan innehåller även Finland som ursprungsland som inte anges i certifikatet. Övriga uppgifter stämmer, men verifieringen av ursprungslandet kräver manuell granskning.
